title: Unified Active Retrieval

defines.name: UAR
defines.definition: A unified active retrieval framework that judges whether to retrieve by combining multiple orthogonal criteria into lightweight classification tasks.

defines.name: UAR-Criteria
defines.definition: A standardized decision procedure that prioritizes multiple retrieval criteria and unifies them into a single multifaceted retrieval decision tree.

problem: Existing active retrieval methods rely on a single criterion and specialized procedures, making them ineffective for diverse instructions and costly to integrate efficiently into RAG systems.
